scenes.title: Approaching Veldrane
scenes.valueShift: From 'Kaelith is operationally necessary' to 'Kaelith is dying and I cannot accept that'
craftToolsApplied: T1: Scene-Sequel Structure (Goal: reach Veldrane, Conflict: Oathbrand flares, Disaster: realizes deterioration is critical)
T14: MRU structure (Kaelith's flare → Lirien's observation → assessment → action)
T22: Opening hook with medical crisis

scenes.title: The Healer
scenes.valueShift: From 'we have time to reach the Quietus' to 'we are in a race against Kaelith's body shutting down'
craftToolsApplied: T1: Scene-Sequel Structure (Goal: get diagnosis, Conflict: worse than expected, Disaster: four months to live)
Diagnostic mirror as concrete worldbuilding detail

scenes.title: Lirien's Reckoning
scenes.valueShift: From 'I am protecting an asset' to 'I am caring for someone I cannot afford to lose'
craftToolsApplied: T1: Sequel structure (Reaction to diagnosis → Dilemma about feelings → Decision to care without justification)
Voice evolution: Lirien's analytical language breaking down

emotionalArc.startState: Observational concern (tactical notation of Kaelith's deterioration)
emotionalArc.pivotMoment: Marin's diagnosis - 'four months, perhaps six' triggers fear that Lirien cannot classify as operational
emotionalArc.endState: Acknowledged care (terrified of Kaelith dying, terror is personal not professional)

fantasyBeats: Oathbrand crisis revelation - remote refresh means active surveillance and intent to kill
Magical pressure fractures visible in diagnostic mirror
Timeline established: four to six months until systemic magical necrosis
romanceBeats: Care without strategy - Lirien begins adjusting for Kaelith's needs beyond contract requirements
Recognition of personal investment: 'I do not want her to die...because I require it'
Protective watching while Kaelith sleeps - devotion without tactical justification

knowledgeStates.CHAR-002: Now knows Kaelith has 4-6 months to live, brand is actively refreshed, acknowledges personal care for Kaelith

activeStoryPromises: Identity of who is refreshing the brand

planted: Remote brand refresh suggests active surveillance and high-level Imperial involvement
Magical pressure fractures as measurable progression toward death

craftProfileCompliance.T1_SceneSequel: Applied to all three scenes with clear Goal-Conflict-Disaster progression
craftProfileCompliance.T14_MRU: Used throughout, especially in examination sequence and Lirien's internal processing
craftProfileCompliance.T22_ChapterHooks: Medical crisis opening, quiet devotion closing
craftProfileCompliance.Voice_Distinctness: Lirien's analytical precision maintained but starting to break down under emotional pressure
